title: Spirit Wolf Origin Datapack
description: A Datapack adding the Spirit Wolf Origin, ispired by the Phantom Origin from the Origins mod and the Wolf Origin from Mob Origins mod.
body:
![wolfy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f544b6d26ebb5e6b250f0445352c54af1b5c220d.png)
A Datapack adding the **_Spirit Wolf_** Origin, ispired by the **_Phantom Origin_** from the _Origins_ mod and the **_Wolf Origin_** from _Mob Origins_ mod.


*Origin* created by ***Chris_The_Big!*** 

## Spirit Wolf
Primordial ancestors of wolves, ethereal entities possessing an unmatched potency that surpasses all earthly life.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Spirit Form	
**(Toggle with Primary!)	       (Mobs will ignore you once Invisible!)**                   
You can turn into your Spirit Form at will, becoming invisible and able to phase through solid objects. However, other actions are restricted.                                     
### Translucent                                                                  
Your skin is translucent.                                                         
### Wolf Body                                                                          
Due to your ghostly form and your previous wolf proportions, you are less durable.       
### Wolf's Strength	                                                                      
**(You also deal increased damage to Skeletons.)**                      
You have increased strength and are faster on foot.                                    
### Wolf Pack                                                                                
When you are near at least 4 wolves, you gain speed and strength.                   
### Nocturnal Power                                                                        
Your Speed, Health and Strength are increased during the night.                      
### Weak to Fire                                                                            
You take double the damage from fire.                                             
### Explosion Weakness                                                                          
You take double the damage from any kind of explosion.                              
### Carnivorous                                                                               
Your diet is restricted to meat, you can't eat vegetables.

</details>
